negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_148
prompt: The video opens with a first-person point-of-view shot of a robot at a wooden table. The robot's legs, clad in gray pants and black shoes, are visible, with wheels under the table and grippers extending from the bottom. On the table, a white Adidas box with black text is prominently displayed, accompanied by a green cup resting on top of it. To the right of the box, a clear plastic water bottle with a blue label and a white cap is positioned, while a small yellow sticky note lies to the left. In the background, a plain wall with a thermostat or control panel is visible, along with part of another table to the left. A person can be seen walking in the distance towards the right edge of the frame.  As the video progresses, the robot extends its right gripper forward, reaching out to grasp the green cup placed atop the Adidas box. The gripper moves smoothly from its initial position to securely hold the cup. The scene remains focused on the table and the objects on it, with no significant changes in the background or additional objects appearing. By the final frame, the robot has successfully placed the green cup next to the water bottle, maintaining a steady and deliberate motion throughout the sequence.
